evals.expected_output: Should detect Instagram reel, extract metadata (author, likes, caption), transcribe audio via Whisper, and save to vault. Should show a brief summary of what the reel covers.

assertions.text: Response includes the author name (Nick, nicholas.puru, or nicholaspuru)
Response includes engagement stats (likes count or comments count)
Response includes a transcript or summary of spoken content from the reel
A vault note file was created in the vault or output directory
Response includes a human-readable summary, not just raw metadata dump

evals.prompt: what does this video say? https://youtu.be/eA9Zf2-qYYM
evals.expected_output: Should detect YouTube URL, extract metadata, pull captions (not Whisper since YT has captions), summarize the content, and answer the question about what the video covers. Should save to vault.

assertions.text: Response answers the question by summarizing what the video covers
Response mentions the video topic (AI agents, building agents, or agent loops)
Transcript was obtained via captions (not Whisper) since YouTube has captions available
A vault note file was created

evals.prompt: someone sent me this on whatsapp, can you quickly tell me what its about? https://www.instagram.com/reel/DVUJeahgMMe/
evals.expected_output: Should extract the Instagram reel, transcribe, and give a concise summary focused on answering 'what is it about'. Should be quick and conversational.

assertions.text: Response is concise — under 300 words (user said 'quickly')
Response summarizes what the reel is about
Response does NOT include a raw transcript dump
Tone is conversational, not formal report-style
